headline: Starbucks Corporation Announces Early Results and Upsizing of its Tender Offers for Eight Series of Notes
summary: SEATTLE, May 16, 2026--Starbucks Corporation (Nasdaq: SBUX) ("Starbucks," "we," "us" or the "Company") today announced the early results of its previously announced tender offers to purchase (each offer a "Tender Offer" and collectively, the "Tender Offers") for cash the notes of the series listed in the table below (collectively, the "Notes"). The Tender Offers were made pursuant to the Offer to Purchase, dated May 4, 2026 (the "Offer to Purchase"), which sets forth a more comprehensive descrip
